title: Compatible Optimisations
description: Quicker than the competition! Compatible Optimisations, a well-researched game optimisation pack designed as a base to add mods upon whilst staying compatible.  Also works as a vanilla optimisation pack. Now updated to 1.21!
body:
# **Compatible Optimisations**

This is Compatible Optimisations, a modpack designed to optimise your minecraft client whilst allowing you to install and play with whichever mods you wish. 

---
## Features
**Performance:**
This modpack gives you highly enhanced game performance better than the likes of OptiFine thanks to a combination of great performance enhancing mods, notably Sodium, Lithium and Indium.

**Fully Compatible:**
Whilst being highly optimised for performance, this modpack manages to stay completely compatible with all the mods you want to use. This is thanks to all the mods being fully open source allowing for high compatibility.

**Better for everyone:**
This modpack is designed to enhance your performance on whatever device you are using from a complete potato to an overclocked beast you will still feel a giant performance leap.

**Built for Fabric:**
This modpack has been created using the Fabric API. The fabric API is easy to use, lightweight, supports lots of mods, and is built to be easy to use by modders. 

**Fully Client-Side:**
This modpack is fully client-sided. This means that this modpack and all of its performance enhancements can be used on any vanilla server you want!
